org.apache.dubbo.config

    org.apache.dubbo.config

    A bunch of builder classes to facilitate programming of raw API.

  • com.alibaba.dubbo.config使用的org.apache.dubbo.config中的类 
    类和说明
    ApplicationConfig
    The application info
    ArgumentConfig
    The method arguments configuration
    ConsumerConfig
    The service consumer default configuration
    MethodConfig
    The method configuration
    ModuleConfig
    The module info
    MonitorConfig
    MonitorConfig
    ProtocolConfig
    ProtocolConfig
    ProviderConfig
    The service provider default configuration
    ReferenceConfig
    Please avoid using this class for any new application, use ReferenceConfigBase instead.
    RegistryConfig
    RegistryConfig
    ServiceConfig

    Utility methods and public methods for parsing configuration
